data.title: NEXE Innovations reports Q2 2026 financial results: $198,644 revenue, 25% unit cost improvement, $10.6M cash reserve. Aim to scale efficiently.
data.description: NEXE Innovations Inc. reported financial results for Q2 2026, showing revenue growth to $198,644 from $70,754 in Q2 2025. The company's revenue for the first half of fiscal 2026 reached $319,128, surpassing total 2025 revenues of $307,543. Gross margins were slightly negative due to setup costs for a new client and fulfilling a big initial order, but unit costs improved by 25%. Operating expenses fell 42.6% year-over-year to $520,145. NEXE ended the quarter with $10.6 million in cash and GIC investments, and minimal debt. The company is exploring strategies to accelerate commercialization timelines through partnerships, licensing arrangements, and potential acquisitions to leverage its compostable technology. NEXE aims to push its products through high-volume distribution channels for faster growth.

data.title: ATTOM unveils MCP server for AI apps and expands cloud data delivery via Databricks to enhance data access.
data.description: In Irvine, California on January 29, 2026, ATTOM, a top provider of land, property data, and real estate analytics, revealed two innovative additions to its technology platform. These new offerings aim to enhance data delivery and accessibility to artificial intelligence (AI) throughout analytics and AI workflows. This move demonstrates ATTOM’s commitment to strengthening its services, catering to the increasing demand for efficient data management.

data.title: Toll Brothers to open luxury home community in Kyle, Texas. Clara Vista at Waterridge in Hays County will offer exclusive amenities.
data.description: Clara Vista at Waterridge is set to offer premium amenities and upscale residences in a highly sought-after area within Hays County. This development will showcase exclusive features and luxurious homes, catering to the discerning buyer looking for high-end living. With a prime location, Clara Vista at Waterridge is positioned to attract individuals seeking a sophisticated lifestyle in the region.

data.title: Bitcoin's decline may deepen due to Death Cross signal as charts indicate further losses for bulls.
data.description: The current technical analysis of Bitcoin indicates a troubling trend, with charts pointing towards further difficulties for bullish investors.

data.title: Apple reports record-breaking Q1 results with $143.8 billion revenue, up 16% YoY, and earnings per share of $2.84, up 19%.
data.description: Apple revealed its financial performance for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, ending on December 27, 2025. The tech giant reported a significant increase in quarterly revenue amounting to $143.8 billion, marking a 16% rise compared to the previous year. Diluted earnings per share also saw a notable uptick at $2.84, reflecting a 19% increase year over year. Tim Cook, CEO of Apple, expressed pride in the company's record-breaking results, exceeding expectations with the impressive revenue figures. Apple's success was underscored by the strong performance of its flagship product, the iPhone.

data.title: Beeline Holdings, Inc. will host stakeholder update call on Q4 2025 results on March 30, 2026, at 5 p.m. ET.
data.description: Beeline Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: BLNE) based in Providence, R.I., revealed plans to conduct a stakeholder update call to discuss the fourth quarter's performance in 2025. The event is scheduled for Monday, March 30, 2026, at 5 p.m. ET. Beeline Holdings is a rapidly expanding digital mortgage platform that is transforming the homebuying journey. This update call aims to provide insights into the company's recent financial results and strategic direction. Investors and interested individuals can tune in to learn about the latest developments and future prospects of Beeline Holdings, Inc.

data.title: Visa's (V) Q1 earnings beat estimates with $3.17 EPS and $10.9 billion revenue. Shares slip in trading.
data.description: Visa, Inc. (NYSE: V) saw a decline in its shares during after-hours trading on Thursday following the release of its first-quarter earnings report, despite surpassing analysts' expectations. In terms of key figures for the quarter, Visa reported earnings of $3.17 per share, exceeding the consensus estimate of $3.14. Quarterly revenue stood at $10.9 billion, surpassing the Street estimate of $10.69 billion. Furthermore, Visa experienced a 9% increase in payments volume for the quarter ending on September 30, 2025, which is crucial for recognizing fiscal first-quarter service revenue. For more detailed information, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: $60M contract awarded to Parsons Transportation for 2.3-mile Claremont extension of Metro A Line. Major progress made by Foothill Gold Line.
data.description: Today, a significant achievement was announced in Monrovia, California, as the board of directors for the Foothill Gold Line Construction Authority revealed progress on the 2.3-mile Pomona to Claremont project. This project aims to extend the Metro A Line to Claremont. The milestone reached is a major step forward in the development of this crucial transportation initiative.

data.title: Service Hero launches Service Hero Electrical in Southern California, expanding to offer residential and commercial electrical services in Los Angeles County.
data.description: In Los Angeles on January 29, 2026, Service Hero, a reputable company known for plumbing and HVAC services, has unveiled its latest venture, Service Hero Electrical. This new division will cater to the electrical needs of both residential and commercial properties throughout Los Angeles County, Orange, and surrounding areas. The expansion aims to provide top-notch professional electrical services to a wider customer base.

data.description: Deckers Outdoor (NYSE: DECK) reported its Q3 earnings on January 29, 2026, at 04:05 PM. The company surpassed estimated earnings by 20.0%, posting an EPS of $3.33 compared to the expected $2.77. Revenue saw a $131.00 million increase from the previous year. data.title: Egan-Jones highlights scrutiny on proxy advisors; JPMorgan CEO's frustrations noted. Market concerns rising.
data.description: In a recent report released on January 29, 2026, independent financial rating firm Egan-Jones highlighted the increasing scrutiny faced by proxy advisors in recent quarters. Jamie Dimon, the CEO of JPMorgan, echoed the frustrations expressed by numerous market participants regarding this issue. The concerns surrounding proxy advisors have gained more attention due to their potential impact. This highlights a growing need for transparency and oversight in this sector.

data.title: Kioxia and Sandisk extend Yokkaichi joint venture agreement through 2034, after 25 years of partnership.
data.description: Kioxia Corporation, a subsidiary of Kioxia Holdings Corporation (TOKYO: 285A), along with Sandisk Corporation (NASDAQ: SNDK), has confirmed the extension of their joint venture contracts at Kioxia’s Yokkaichi Plant. The initial agreement, slated to end on December 31, 2029, has been lengthened by five more years, pushing the new conclusion date to December 31, 2034. This move signifies a key achievement in their enduring collaboration, which has persisted for over 25 years.

data.title: SanDisk (SNDK) stock soars after beating estimates, quarterly earnings of $6.20 per share, sales $3.025 billion.
data.description: SanDisk Corp. (NASDAQ: SNDK) witnessed a significant surge in its shares during after-hours trading on Thursday following the release of its second-quarter earnings report. The company outperformed expectations on both top and bottom lines. Key figures from the quarter include quarterly earnings of $6.20 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of $3.12 by 98.53%. Additionally, quarterly sales amounted to $3.025 billion, exceeding the analyst consensus of $2.599 billion by 16.41%. Notably, data center revenue saw a substantial increase of 64% from the previous quarter. For further details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com. Watch SNDK stock for ongoing price movements.

data.title: Western Digital surpasses Q2 expectations with $3.02B revenue and $2.13 EPS, shares volatile.
data.description: Western Digital Corp released their fiscal Q2 2026 results post-market close on Thursday. The report highlighted that the company surpassed expectations on both top and bottom lines. Q2 revenue stood at $3.02 billion compared to the estimated $2.92 billion, while Q2 Adjusted EPS was $2.13, exceeding the estimated $1.92. The total revenue saw a 25% increase year-over-year. The company reported $745 million cash flow from operations and $653 million in free cash flow for the quarter. The gross margin for the quarter was 45.7%, or 46.1% on an adjusted basis. Stock trends for Western Digital are positive following the announcement of these results.

data.title: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (PMT) reports Q4 2025 net income $41.9 million, $93.6 million net investment income. Cash dividend $0.40/share declared.
data.description: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (NYSE: PMT) disclosed its financial results for Q4 2025, with a net income of $41.9 million for common shareholders. Earnings per common share stood at $0.48, derived from net investment income totaling $93.6 million. The company had earlier declared a cash dividend of $0.40 per common share for Q4 2025, announced on December 10, 2025. This dividend is scheduled to be disbursed on January 23, 2026, to common shareholders.

data.title: PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. reported net income of $106.8 million in Q4 2025 with total revenues of $538.0 million.
data.description: PennyMac Financial Services, Inc. disclosed a net profit of $106.8 million in the fourth quarter of 2025, translating to $1.97 per share on a diluted basis. The total net revenues stood at $538.0 million during this period. The book value per share saw an increase from $81.12 to $82.77 as of September 30, 2025. PFSI's Board of Directors announced a cash dividend of $0.30 per share for the fourth quarter, which will be paid on February 26, 2026, to common stockholders recorded as of February 16, 2026.
